title: Fresh edit examples do not explain the missing action signal
decision: Reject fresh-versus-repeated exposure as the main cause, retain mask as distribution-specific, and re-audit token-aligned checkpoints with a token-level causal metric before any new training or scale increase.
plain_summary: Five runs completed. Fresh and fixed mixed training are nearly identical, mask sensitivity does not transfer, and lower-rate LDAD remains pooled-action-insensitive. An eight-example diagnostic finds token-level shuffled error triples while pooled error rises only one percent, so the pooled causal gate is invalid for token-aligned models and a full re-audit is required.
